ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: I can handle negative comments about my gender identity without letting it affect me.
I remain positive even when I face discrimination because of my gender identity
I know how to stand up for myself when others invalidate my identity.
I have healthy ways to cope when I face stress related to my gender identity
When I encounter challenges because of my gender identity, I know how to handle them.
I feel supported by my friends when it comes to my gender identity.
I feel like I belong to a community that supports transgender people.
I feel confident in standing up for my rights as a transgender woman.
I am able to seek help and resources when I need them for my gender-affirming
I feel comfortable expressing my gender identity in public spaces
I am proud of who I am as a transgender woman.
